title: celtis sinensis var. tetrandra
intro: Celtis sinensis var. tetrandra, also known as Tetrandra, is a variety of the Chinese cork tree or Celtis sinensis, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Tetrandra include improving circulation, reducing blood sugar levels, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Tetrandra is typically prepared as a decoction or a tincture, with herbal preparations often combining it with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
